title: Luminous: Monsters
description: LUMINOUS: Monsters brings 14 new Zombie and Skeleton variants to the base game, each in their own respective environment. All of these variants can be found in my other mods  -LUMINOUS and LUMINOUS: NETHER
body:
LUMINOUS: Monsters brings 12 new Zombie and Skeleton variants to the base game, each in their own respective environment. All 12 of these variants can be found in my other mod - LUMINOUS - but this mod is just for those looking to fight these undead foes!

![LUMINOUS: Monsters is a version of my original mod: LUMINOUS, with only the mob variants. It is not recommended you have this mod active at the same time as LUMINOUS. REQUIRES GECKOLIB!!! - - - Miner Zombie, Miner Skeleton, Frigid Zombie, Frigid Skeleton,](https://i.imgur.com/jsabik4.png)
![Swamp Zombie, Swamp Skeleton, Savannah Zombie, Savannah Skeleton, Dark Oak Zombie, Dark Oak Skeleton, The Hollow, and the Sunken](https://i.imgur.com/o63rVCY.png)![Crimson Walker, Revenant](https://i.imgur.com/gaQmdg1.png)
